title: Biome Edition Visual Traveler's Titles
description: Give a RPG feeling to your exploration for every new biome you'll cross, even those from Terralith and more...
body:
/!\\ AI-generated design, more about that later /!\\

__**YOU NEED TO INSTALL TRAVELER'S TITLES**__  

Inspired by [Visual Traveler's Titles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-travelers-titles) resource pack add-on by [@un\_roman](https://www.curseforge.com/members/un_roman/projects).

This resource pack add-on works paired with [Traveler's Titles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/travelers-titles-neoforge) mod and offers a visual text for most of the vanilla biomes just as [@un\_roman](https://www.curseforge.com/members/un_roman/projects)'s Visual Traveler's Titles does with dimensions.

It is compatible with [Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralit) and [Regions Unexplored](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/regions-unexplored).

Not all the biomes have been treated (just because I wanted to focus on those I got inspirated to create good prompts)

However, keep in mind that this resource pack add-on uses only AI generated content : [@un\_roman](https://www.curseforge.com/members/un_roman/projects)'s work is artist-made and have unique feeling an AI could never reproduce. Knowing that, this add-on is only temporary and is aimed to be replaced soon later by any artist that could have the time to do it ! AI generated content is sometimes based on stolen art and represent a danger to artists. The AI used here is "Dreamlab" from Canva, I honestly don't know if it has any good ethic guidelines. AI is still a powerful tool to allow creativity from mind to computer without any skill for anyone. If there is any problem with this resource pack add-on and its AI generated content, I will delete the problem without hesitation. It's just an innocent work from some motivated unskilled guy that wanted to have a Visual Traveler's Titles equivalent to his vanilla, terralith and regions unexplored biomes, and thought it could be cool to share it ; yet playing with powerful and not regulated tools.

 

AUTHORIZATIONS : Feel free to do EVERYTHING you want with these, AI production belongs to everyone. You can even copy that and release your own version where you slowly replace AI-generated titles by hand-drawn ones. As long as you don't copy-paste the project without any addition, and you don't try to sell or get money with the original idea, I guess you can do anything.

  

**MISSING BIOMES** 

\--------- Regions Unexplored -------------

All done (up until RU 0.5.6.1)

\--------- Terralith -------------

Red Oasis (seems to be bugged)

\--------- Minecraft -------------

All 4 windswept biomes

**ROADMAP**
- All vanilla biomes implemented (4 bugged biomes remaining)
- New visuals for old generated titles + sound integration
- Update to recent Terralith and Regions Unexplored releases
- William Wyther's Expanded Ecosphere compat !
